raw_content_preview: {"findings":[{"rule_id":"R001","issue":"Authentication details are incomplete: the spec only says the endpoint requires login, but does not define the authentication method, required roles/scopes, or behavior on authentication failure.","severity":"high","evidence":"Notes: \"The endpoint requires login.\""},{"rule_id":"R002","issue":"Request field constraints are under-specified: required/optional status, defaults, types, ranges, lengths, and enum values are not fully documented.","severity":"me
